rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MICHAEL PAUL BAERTSCHIGER
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: grant without hearing. while not an issue at this stage of the proceedings, the allegation that the entire loan is a liability of the estate's 10% interest in the real property does not appear to be supported by the documents filed that show the note secured by 100% of the property. it is noted that while the deed was signed in 2004, it was not recorded until 2006 and the note was taken out in 2005.
